overview.title: Where AI
overview.description: A creative platform where artificial intelligence meets human imagination. Upload your world — an image, a moment, a feeling — and watch AI crews transform it into unexpected forms of art. Each crew brings a unique lens, a different voice, a fresh interpretation.

poetsCrew.title: Poets Crew
poetsCrew.description: A team of AI poets reads your image and writes original poems — modern, classical, and mystical. Your photo becomes poetry in three distinct voices.

Dashboard.crewDescription: Upload a story-telling image — a portrait, a landscape, a candid moment — and a team of AI poets will craft original verse inspired by what they see. One writes in a modern voice, one in a classical voice, and one answers with a mystical poem. Your photo becomes poetry.

AuthSchema.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
AuthSchema.nameRegex: Only letters and spaces are allowed
AuthSchema.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
AuthSchema.usernameRegex: Only letters, numbers and underscores are allowed
AuthSchema.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
AuthSchema.passwordRegex: Password is alphanumeric here with underscore and dashes allowed

error.indistinctContentTitle: We need a clearer story image
error.indistinctContentMessage: This upload appears too abstract, indistinct, or non-narrative for poem generation. Please upload a clear scene, portrait, action, animal, architecture, or nature moment.
error.retryExhaustedMessage: We are unable to process your request at this time. Please, try again later
error.requestLimitMessage: You have reached the maximum of 3 poem generations per account
